_meta.notes: Small mammal — prey, not threat. Lives in the dripping cavern. Referenced by survive-the-night beat 02-the-rat. Players can choose to absorb (gains essence + a trace of the rat's panic chemistry as a marker) or let it flee (the choice itself is what beat 03-the-choice tracks).

tagline: small, fast, and full of panic-chemistry that something larger is hunting.

behavior.default: flees from the player and from larger things
behavior.ifAttacked: panics and skitters in random directions
behavior.ifAbsorbed: gone — leaves no body, only a faint trail of fur on your boundary
narrativeHooks: The rat's claws clatter on stone before its body registers as a thing.
Adrenaline, urine, and the sharp tang of fear arrive before the rat does.
It does not see you. It is being chased by something that sees it.

interactions.smother: available, awkward — slime spreads slowly, rat is fast
interactions.sense_tremor: always returns: a fast, light heartbeat through the rock
interactions.ooze_toward: available; rat will flee on close approach
